grant_title: Access for All Abilities Mini Grants
eligible_applicant_type: Rhode Island school or school organization
Rhode Island city and town government agency
geographic_restrictions: Rhode Island or primarily serve Rhode Island communities
project_area: Improving accessibility for social, leisure, recreational, and cultural activities for people with disabilities
demographic_requirements: Applicants must provide social, leisure, recreational or cultural activities to the public. Organizations whose primary mission or client/customer base is disability focused are not eligible.
eligibility_summary: Open to for-profit businesses, nonprofits, Rhode Island schools, and city/town government agencies in Rhode Island. Projects must enhance accessibility for people with disabilities in social, leisure, recreational, or cultural activities. Excludes organizations primarily serving people with disabilities.
